Abdoulaye Katchala Mele (Alph4kam)

Rennes, France

I’m a cybersecurity research intern. I enjoy playing CTFs, solving challenges and learning new things, particularly in reverse engineering and binary exploitation.

Experience

DRM Security Research Internship

March 2026 - Present •
Inria

I'm currently working on a research project focused on the security of Digital Rights Management (DRM) systems on android, with a focus on Google’s Widevine DRM.

Secure Compilation Internship

May 2025 - August 2025 •
Inria

I contributed to design a custom GCC attribute to mark secrets and a plugin to track them in memory, with detection of missing zeroization and non-constant-time usage.

IoT Security Internship

March 2024 - August 2024 •
Decima

I worked on risk analysis for information systems, conducted penetration testing and secured communication protocols, and contributed to the deployment of a Public Key Infrastructure (PKI).
